notableEvents.label: Error-aided run(s) allowed
notableEvents.detail: Marcus Semien reaches on a fielder's choice, fielded by third baseman Jorbit Vivas. MJ Melendez scores. Mark Vientos scores. Brett Baty to 3rd. Marcus Semien to 2nd. Fielding error by third baseman Jorbit Vivas.
